title: Ubiquiti UISP Cable Pro (TC-Pro), outdoor FTP cable, Cat5e, 305m
description: The UISP-Cable-Pro is a Category 5e cable with a highly insulating, weatherproof jacket that prevents damage from rain, snow, and other extreme climatic conditions. The cable is also fortified with internal foil shielding and a drain wire that collectively shield it from electrostatic discharge (ESD) and allow it to maintain Gigabit Ethernet link rates even when electromagnetic interference is present Total length - 305m Cat 5e 24 AWG solid copper conductor pairings Insulated, weatherproof cable jacket Internal foil shielding and drain wire for increased ESD damage protection
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Shielding type FTP (F/UTP) Installation temperature [°C] 20 up to 60 Storage temperature [°C] 30 up to 75 Weight [kg/km] 39 Conductor wire gauge AWG24 Cable type Solid Purpose Outdoor Conductor material Copper Sheath material PE Length [m] 305 Outer diameter [mm) 6 Color Black
